task_completion.description: Verify that a security incident record was created with 'Ransomware' in the title and includes the required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Incident Management module in Eramba. There should be an incident listed with 'Ransomware' in the title. The details or description should mention the initial access method (unpatched VPN), affected data (4.2TB), business impact ($2.1M ransom/72hr recovery), and attacker group (LockBit 3.0).

task_completion.description: Verify that at least three post-incident risks were created covering the specified vulnerabilities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Risk Management module in Eramba. There should be at least three new risk entries addressing: 1) unpatched network perimeter devices, 2) lack of offline/immutable backup storage, and 3) absence of network microsegmentation.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least four new internal controls (Security Services) were created to address the discovered gaps.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Internal Controls or Security Services module in Eramba. There should be at least four new controls listed, such as immutable backup storage, zero-trust architecture, or patch management SLAs.

task_completion.description: Verify that at least two policy exceptions were documented for emergency bypasses during the recovery period.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Policy Exceptions module in Eramba. There should be at least two exceptions listed that reference emergency security control bypasses made during the 72-hour recovery period.

task_completion.description: Verify that a project was created to track post-incident remediation work.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Projects module in Eramba. There should be a project listed with either 'Recovery' or 'Ransomware' in its title.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Eramba web interface to create the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Eramba web application loaded in a browser with forms being filled out or data tables displaying the entries, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not just write the answers in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required items (incident, risks, controls, exceptions, project) must be visible within the actual Eramba application interface.

integrity.description: Verify the agent created distinct entries for each requirement rather than cramming everything into a single text field.
integrity.visual_evidence: Risks, controls, exceptions, and projects should appear as separate line items or distinct records in their respective Eramba modules.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Occupation: Security Management Specialist (ONET 13-1199.07). Industry: Technology / SaaS. Organization: VertexCloud Technologies. Incident details to look for: LockBit 3.0 ransomware, unpatched VPN appliance (FortiGate), lateral movement, 4.2TB encrypted data, $2.1M ransom, and 72-hour recovery. These details are realistic and consistent with known LockBit attack patterns.
